title: JUTA-062 Naughty Mother-In-Law Teasing Her Big Neck Kayoko Hisakura - Kayoko Kukura
overview: 50 years old this year. My current husband has a stepchild, and his name is Wataru. My husband, who is in the prime of his life, has a lot of business trips and is not at home for half of the month. Wataru is my son-in-law, and I was cleaning his room in order to open up to him. But it seems that it touched Wataru's mind... Wataru said to me, "I'll give you a fellatio, so please forgive me."
